title: SEQUENCES - better reporting
excerpt:

There is no way to see, from a top level perspective, the engagement in emails in a sequence

posts.author: Harry (Harry)
posts.cookedHtml:
PROBLEM:
There is no way to see, from a top level perspective, the engagement in emails in a sequence

SOLUTION:
Similar to the Mass Email Tracking, have a page that shows how each email in a sequence has performed, including open rates, click through rates, responses etc.
Also, be able to add this information to Leads on the Lead board (i.e. to allow the ability to filter by whether a lead has opened an email or not)

posts.author: aaronchen (aaron)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea, I thought so too. Since we are already on the Sequences page, why can’t we click directly on this thread to view the record? Isn’t this more convenient?I hope the authorities will see this suggestion.

posts.author: Harry (Harry)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, great idea. Sequences can do with a few small additions that would make it very powerful
